skill.name: SEO Keyword Strategist
skill.description: Analyzes keyword usage in content, calculates density, and suggests semantic variations and LSI keywords. Prevents over-optimization for content optimization workflows.
skill.summary: AI-powered keyword analysis and semantic optimization for SEO content.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This skill contains only prompt instructions in SKILL.md with no executable code, network access, or system commands. Static analysis correctly identified zero security issues. The skill provides SEO keyword analysis guidance through natural language prompts only.

content.user_title: Optimize SEO Keywords and Content Strategy
content.value_statement: Content creators struggle with keyword stuffing and poor semantic optimization. This skill analyzes keyword density and suggests natural LSI variations for better search rankings.
actual_capabilities: Calculate keyword density percentages for primary and secondary keywords
Identify primary and secondary keyword targets from content
Generate 20-30 LSI keyword suggestions based on topic analysis
Detect over-optimization and keyword stuffing patterns
Map entity relationships and related concepts for topical depth
Provide keyword placement recommendations for natural integration
limitations: Requires content input to analyze - cannot generate content from scratch
Keyword suggestions are based on semantic analysis, not live search volume data
Does not integrate directly with external SEO platforms or analytics tools
Entity analysis is limited to provided content context

use_cases.title: Blog Post Optimization
use_cases.description: Content writers analyze draft articles to ensure optimal keyword density and natural semantic variation before publishing.

use_cases.title: SEO Audit Workflow
use_cases.description: Marketing teams evaluate existing web pages for keyword optimization opportunities and over-optimization warnings.

use_cases.title: Content Strategy Planning
use_cases.description: Agencies develop keyword clusters and topical authority maps for client content hubs and pillar pages.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Keyword Density Check
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze this content for keyword density. Identify the primary keyword and calculate its usage percentage. Flag if it exceeds 1.5% density: [paste content]

prompt_templates.title: Secondary Keyword Discovery
prompt_templates.prompt: Based on this content about [topic], identify 5 secondary keywords that would complement the primary keyword. Provide search intent for each: [paste content]

prompt_templates.title: LSI Keyword Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate 20-30 LSI keywords and semantic variations for this content. Group them by relevance and include entity relationships: [paste content]

prompt_templates.title: Complete SEO Keyword Audit
prompt_templates.prompt: Perform a full keyword audit: calculate primary keyword density, identify 5 secondary targets, generate 25 LSI keywords, map entities, detect over-optimization, and provide a content optimization checklist: [paste content]

output_examples.input: Article about sustainable gardening practices with focus on 'organic composting'
output: Primary: organic composting (0.9% density, 8 uses) - Optimal range
Secondary: soil health, nutrient cycling, waste reduction, garden sustainability, eco-friendly practices
LSI Keywords: decomposition, brown materials, green materials, carbon-to-nitrogen ratio, vermiculture, humus, aerobic breakdown
Entities: microorganisms, earthworms, pH balance, nitrogen fixation, mycelium networks
Over-optimization: None detected - natural keyword distribution

output_examples.input: Product page for project management software targeting 'team collaboration tools'
output: Primary: team collaboration tools (1.8% density, 15 uses) - Slightly over-optimized
Recommendation: Reduce primary keyword usage by 3-4 instances
Secondary: remote team software, project tracking, workflow management, team communication platform
LSI Keywords: task assignments, deadline tracking, file sharing, real-time updates, integration capabilities
Warning: Keyword stuffing detected in header tags - distribute more naturally

best_practices: Maintain primary keyword density between 0.5-1.5% for natural optimization
Use semantic variations and LSI keywords to build topical depth without repetition
Place keywords strategically in headers, introduction, and conclusion for maximum impact
anti_patterns: Keyword stuffing with exact-match terms in every paragraph
Ignoring search intent and forcing irrelevant keywords into content
Focusing only on keyword density while neglecting entity relationships and topical coverage

faq.question: What is the ideal keyword density for SEO?
faq.answer: Best practice recommends 0.5-1.5% density for primary keywords. Focus on natural integration rather than hitting exact percentages.

faq.question: How many LSI keywords should I include in my content?
faq.answer: Aim for 20-30 semantic variations distributed naturally throughout your content to build topical authority.

faq.question: Can this skill work with any type of content?
faq.answer: Yes, it analyzes blog posts, product pages, landing pages, and any text-based content for keyword optimization.

faq.question: Does this skill provide search volume data?
faq.answer: No, it focuses on semantic analysis and keyword relationships. Use dedicated keyword research tools for search volume metrics.

faq.question: How does entity analysis improve SEO?
faq.answer: Entity analysis helps search engines understand context and relationships, improving topical authority and relevance signals.

faq.question: What should I do if over-optimization is detected?
faq.answer: Reduce exact-match keyword usage, replace with semantic variations, and ensure natural distribution throughout the content.
